correct_models.name: resnet_block

buggy_models.name: mlp_dim_mismatch
buggy_models.description: MLP with mismatched hidden dimensions (256 vs 128)
violations: SafetyViolation(kind='shape_incompatible', step_index=2, step=Step(LAYER_CALL, in=['h'], out=__ret_2, layer=fc2), message='Linear expects last dim=128, got 256', tensor_a='h', tensor_b=None, shape_a=TensorShape(dims=(batch, 256)), shape_b=None, device_a=None, device_b=None, confidence=<Confidence.HIGH: 'high'>, fp_category=None)
